feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Werewolfing Heights
entry.summary:
Author: ShieldOfIron

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 513Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: You don't know what you smell like to werewolves. Your scent... your throat... your voice," Derek said urgently. "What?" Stiles frowned, shaking his head involuntarily. "I piss them off, I know-" "No. You're... you're... bait." "Excuse me?" "It's a term, it's disgusting but it's this thing. Certain people who are just irresistible."

entry.title: Keystone Species
entry.summary:
Author: SpaceflowerGrace

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,450Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 162

Summary: They didn't talk much about why Stiles was back in town. His mother had been inordinately proud of that fact she went into labor and delivered Stiles alone in the woods. It was the eighties, she couldn’t exactly call her husband on her cell phone. Stiles was born healthy in the preserve. Scott got hurt. Scott is Stiles to protect. He always has been. Stiles is pissed about quite a few things. “Scott is my fifteen year old cousin! And you hurt him and then left him alone and hurt? What’s wrong with you?” He has gotten very close to Derek’s face. Stiles takes a breath and turns away. Or- what if Stiles was the responsible adult at home?

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,503Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Daddy’s Lakehouse Rules
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,623Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: When Stiles gets invited to his girlfriend Erica’s ridiculously wealthy family lakehouse for a week of boating, beach days, and campfires, he figures it’s the perfect chance to impress her parents. He never imagines that after Erica and her mom turn in early one night, a couple of beers with her ex-Marine father Derek will end with both of them naked in the hot tub—and Stiles buried balls-deep in the man who raised his girlfriend. Or the one where Stiles discovers there’s nothing quite like that sense of freedom when there is no swimsuit, his massive cock is spent across his thigh, and he’s just finished pumping every last drop of cum deep into his girlfriend’s hairy, gaping daddy's asshole.

entry.title: Shifting Fates
entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,187Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 143

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,734,777Chapters: 48/?Kudos: 67

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

entry.title: How To Colossally Fuck Shit Up
entry.summary:
Author: Cashewchococake

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,038Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 313

Summary: A story about Derek and Stiles building their family and trying to find their way to each other.orStiles was looking at him expectedly.Derek took a deep breath and prepared himself for the upcoming words. “But I wasn’t the only one he smelled like, Stiles.”He looked pleadingly at Stiles, who'd gone deathly pale, and was now shaking his head.“Stiles-, Eli is your son.” Derek forced out.Stiles let out a small breathless sound of “Oh!”He shot up from the couch and took his head between his hands, pulling his hair.When that didn’t help to quiet the raging flood of questions in his head, he started pacing.“What? -I mean…how? How is that even possible?""Why the hell would you keep that from me?” He was spluttering.Stiles couldn’t believe what he was hearing.  Why would Derek do that?

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,726Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 189

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: A Sense of Déjà Vu
entry.summary:
Author: Chaos_Crew

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,341Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 84

Summary: Seventeen years ago the Hale Pack of Beacon Hills disappears without a trace after a house fire leaving the town to believe they had all suffered the same fate as the family fifteen years prior. Hearing the news of the house fire along with the weird accounts of "freak accidents" the Winchesters and Co. head to Beacon Hills to investigate. A few hours shortly after arriving a dog with to much human like qualities leads Dean to a baby abandoned in an alley. Seventeen years later that baby has grown a lot and is starting to witness the oddities of the towns supernatural accidently ending up back in time to the point where the Hale Pack is starting to find their footing after years of butting heads.

entry.title: The Beast That Wears the Man
entry.summary:
Author: asyndetonic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 127,490Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 55

Summary: To be or not to be… a werewolf in Ancient Rome. An epic romance inspired by Shakespeare’s Hamlet set in the early Roman Empire. Blood and swords and scandals and bathhouses and togas, oh my. Stiles is the heir to Rome making his mark on the frontier of the empire when he encounters Derek, a mysterious barbarian who offers a way to military victory. They face battle, revenge, and imperial plots, and the love and loyalty that grows between them alters the course of history.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 105,131Chapters: 10/11Kudos: 15

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: The Last Hope of the Alphas
entry.summary:
Author: NEVERLANDWONDERLAND

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,849Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 719

Summary: Stiles is magical, being trained for years and finally getting a promotion on his first mission alone. Peter Hale, Deucalion and Chris Argent are 3 dangerous and powerful alphas who were betrayed in the past and now don't have a pack.The high magical council considered their respective crimes as a consequence of this loss of control and that is why they need to be rehabilitated but their scars are very deep and they have not suffered any progress for years. The council decided to give them their last chance after killing their last caregivers, failure would result in death. Stiles, a druid with powers beyond his own understanding, is these Alphas' last hope.

entry.title: Run Boy Run
entry.summary:
Author: myswordhandissinging

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,541Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 868

Summary: Stiles Stilinski knew he should have stayed in to finish his assignment that was due on Monday. Instead, he had to go investigate with the pack. He knew he was going to regret it later, and he probably should have listened to his instincts. When he goes missing, the pack finds him in the same spot after days of searching.   Or the one where Stiles goes missing for a couple of days and comes back blind and with magical powers. What did that bitch do to him?   *This was first published in 2013 as a teenager. Now, as an adult with a developed frontal lobe, the age difference between Derek and Stiles is only 2 years, with Stiles as an 18-year-old high school senior and Derek being 20-years-old.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Stiles is a Winchster
entry.summary:
Author: TacosBeforeMuchachos

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,347Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 413

Summary: *Originally from Wattpad, updates there first (same account name)After being possessed by the nogitsune, Stiles falls into a depression and is consumed by guilt over the friends he's lost.In the world of the supernatural, there must be a way to get them back... that's when he finds out about crossroads demons.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski´s Guide to Derek Hale´s Heart
entry.summary:
Author: tellmewhy4

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,476Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 776

Summary: Derek just wants to relax after a particularly bad fight. After the pack members headed home, he is ready to go to his safe place. Stiles Stilinski chooses that moment to come and search for his laptop.Things begin there.Scott ships it. In fact, everyone does.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,975Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 731

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,227Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
